arts.ttl: Arne Slot handed response after Liverpool vs Plymouth FA Cup shock as Man City warning sent
arts.sum: Championship strugglers Plymouth Argyle delivered an upset against Slot's weakened team

arts.ttl: 'Brilliant piece of goalkeeping' - Hazard denies Liverpool in final minute
arts.sum: Watch as Plymouth Argyle goalkeeper Conor Hazard pulls off a "brilliant" last-minute save to deny Liverpool forward Darwin Nunez and send the Pilgrims through to the fifth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Chelsea facing Premier League competition in race for Liverpool's Caoimhin Kelleher?
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United are reportedly keen on the signing of Liverpool goalkeeper Caoimhin Kelleher during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Plymouth fan savours a second win over Liverpool, 69 years after the first
arts.sum: Lifelong Argyle fan Jed Griffiths was at Home Park for the victory over Liverpool in 1956 and Sunday’s FA Cup shock As snapshots of a lifetime spent following Plymouth Argyle, two wins against Liverpool, almost 70 years apart, stand out for Jed Griffiths. Few among the Home Park faithful attended both but Griffiths, a proud member of the Green Army since 1953, was there for the 4-0 win on 11 February 1956 in the old Second Division, his beloved club’s previous defeat of Liverpool. As for the FA Cup fourth-round giantkilling on Sunday, when the Championship strugglers sank the Premier League leaders, it was “one of the highlights of my footballing life”. In 1956, Griffiths was a schoolboy at Devonport High school, watching the game from the old “Pop Side” of the old Home Park. “No seats in those days,” he says. “We were opposite the grandstand, and we younger kids would get passed down the front, and we hung on the railings for a closeup view.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Everton hero Wayne Rooney lands new job after brutal Plymouth Argyle sacking
arts.sum: The former Everton star and Plymouth Argyle manager was sacked at Home Park on New Year's Eve.

arts.ttl: Wrexham star reacts to Trent Kone-Doherty's Liverpool debut after Arne Slot admission
arts.sum: Liverpool youngster Trent Kone-Doherty featured for the Reds when they were beaten at Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Plymouth’s reward for beating Liverpool in FA Cup is a trip to Manchester City
arts.sum: The Pilgrims were given another Premier League high-flyer in Monday’s fifth round draw.
